targets.rawSql: SELECT api_name, COUNT(DISTINCT plugin_id) AS plugins FROM interactions WHERE event_name = 'grafana_legacy_dashboard_api_used' AND time > now() - interval '30 day' GROUP BY api_name ORDER BY plugins DESC

SELECT plugin_id, api_name, COUNT(*) AS sessions, MAX(time) AS last_seen FROM interactions WHERE event_name = 'grafana_legacy_dashboard_api_used' AND time > now() - interval '30 day' GROUP BY plugin_id, api_name ORDER BY sessions DESC

panels.title: Legacy-API sessions over time, split by api_name

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('1 day', time) AS time, api_name, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS sessions FROM interactions WHERE event_name = 'grafana_legacy_dashboard_api_used' AND time > now() - interval '90 day' GROUP BY 1, api_name ORDER BY 1
